narrative:
Beavercreek 023 (precinct in Greene County) has 1,041 registered voters, with 47.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.6 percentage points.
